response: {"severity":"critical","component":"checkout page","summary":"Checkout page is completely broken on Chrome 121/Windows 11; clicking 'Pay' after entering card info leads to a 30-second spinner then white screen with no error message, console shows CORS and JavaScript errors; works correctly on Firefox","steps_to_reproduce":["Add items to the shopping cart","Navigate to the checkout page","Enter payment card information","Click the 'Pay' button"],"expected_behavior":"Payment should process successfully or display a relevant error message; no white screen or console errors should occur (consistent with working behavior on Firefox)","actual_behavior":"After clicking 'Pay', a spinner displays for 30 seconds followed by a white screen with no visible error message; browser console shows a CORS error and 'undefined is not a function' error in checkout.bundle.js:847; issue reproduced 3 times consistently","environment":{"os":"Windows 11","browser":"Chrome 121"}}
